name: Mesnac Co., Ltd.
summary: Mesnac Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and innovates information equipment and software application for rubber industry in China and internationally. The company offers mixing solutions; mixer feeding systems; chemical weighing system; rubber grinding and blending system; volumetric metering system; open mill automatic mixing system; open mill; integrated exhaust gas control solution; inner-liner production line; pin type cold feed extruder; small angle, textile cord ply, and ply cutting line; application production line; and tire profile extrusion line. It also provides tire building machine; hydraulic cutting presses for TBR, OTR, and PCR; and PCR, TBR, and OTR molds, as well as produces tire recycling products. In addition, the company offers tire X-ray inspection machines; tire uniformity and dynamic balance testing line; tire uniformity testing machine; testing solutions; tire plant automated logistics system solutions; X-ray automated assistant inspection software; RFID tire whole solution; RFID based process management and control system of tire production; JIT production MES systems; warehouse management systems; energy management system; industrial equipment configuration software platform; industry big data service mobile application; and tire retreading. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Qingdao, China.
